jsonLd.title: Delhivery is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
